speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir mein aisa bhayankar dard utha hai ki aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya
text: Mere sir mein aisa bhayankar dard utha hai ki aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya aur ab lagatar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai. Aaj rishta party ne yeh keh kar reject kar diya ki divorcee hone ke saath-saath meri umar bhi zyada hai aur shayad main unke khandaan ko naya waaris na de paun. Is stigma aur humiliation ki wajah se mera pura badan thanda pad gaya hai aur hath-pair kaanp rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the exact physical complaint (Lens A) to validate the somatic overwhelm and handled stigma cue with a soft pause.
text: Tumhare sir mein aisa bhayankar dard utha hai ki aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya aur pura badan thanda pad gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: hath-pair kaanp rahe hain
text: Haan, aur hath-pair itne kaanp rahe hain ki theek se baitha bhi nahi jaa raha. It feels so humiliating. Unhone aise baat ki jaise my only value is giving a 'waaris' to their khandaan. Main working woman hoon, independent hoon, par society ke aage ek 'divorcee' tag ne meri saari izzat khatam kar di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the conflict between her working woman identity and the societal role expectation (Lens B), maintaining soft tone for stigma.
text: Ek independent working woman hone ke bawajood, society ke us divorcee tag ne aur khandaan ko waaris dene ki unki soch ne tumhe andar tak hila diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir ka dard itna zyada hai
text: Andar tak tod diya hai mujhe. Office mein I handle big projects, par ghar pe aake ek commodity ban jati hoon jise log reject kar dete hain. Aur mere sir ka dard itna zyada hai ki I can't even think straight. Kyun face karun in rishta parties ko?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing the weight of the rejection on her physical state after two restatements.
text: Apni professional life mein itni strong hone ke baad, jab yeh log tumhe is tarah measure karte hain, toh yeh sir ka dard us rejection ke bojh ko aur kitna bhari kar deta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ulti jaisa lagna band nahi ho raha
text: Bahut bhari. Aisa lagta hai ki I am carrying the weight of my failed marriage everywhere. Ulti jaisa lagna band nahi ho raha hai. They clearly said umar zyada hai. It's like I have an expiry date. Mere parents ke chehre ka wo disappointment aur bhi unbearable tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of parents' disappointment and being judged by an expiry date (Lens E).
text: Tumhare parents ke chehre par wo disappointment dekhna, aur ye ehsaas ki log tumhe ek expiry date se judge kar rahe hain, is sabne is dard ko aur bada kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: body ekdum thandi pad jaati hai
text: Exactly. Mujhe samajh nahi aata ki main divorcee hoon toh kya mera aage koi future nahi hai? Parents chahte hain jaldi se koi mil jaye taaki unki responsibility khatam ho. Par meri body ekdum thandi pad jaati hai in rishta meetings se pehle. I just want to disappear.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core feeling of being trapped and humiliated in this societal setup.
text: Lagta hai ki is stigma aur parents ki responsibility wali expectation ke beech, tum khud ko poori tarah se trapped aur humiliated mehsoos kar rahi ho, jahan tumhari apni pehchaan koi dekh hi nahi raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aakhon ke aage andhera chha jata hai
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Trapped is the word. Mujhe apni pehchaan ke liye kitna prove karna padega khud ko? Ye jo aakhon ke aage andhera chha jata hai, ye isi helplessness ki wajah se hai. I feel so ashamed that I couldn't keep my first marriage intact.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the shame as a natural reaction to the narrow societal lens on divorcees.
text: Yeh jo tum mehsoos kar rahi ho, bilkul valid hai. Jab humari society mein ek rishta party ek divorcee ko itne narrow lenses se dekhti hai, toh shame aur helplessness aana bohot natural hai, par yeh tumhari value kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir ka bhayankar dard
text: Thank you. But the reality doesn't change. Aaj us rejection ke baad mujhe lag raha hai ki mera wajood bas ek burden hai. Mere sir ka bhayankar dard medication se bhi nahi jaa raha. Sab itna unfair kyun hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote to normalize the burden placed on working women in these situations.
text: Ek working woman jo society ke divorce norms se deal kar rahi ho, usme yeh pattern bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki khandaan ki izzat aur log kya kahenge ka pressure humesha aurat par daala jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kaanpte hue hath-pair
text: Yes, saara blame humesha mujh par hi aata hai. Maine hi adjustment nahi kiya hoga, aisi baatein sunne ko milti hain. Par is sir ke dard aur kaanpte hue hath-pair ke saath main office kaise jaungi kal? I am exhausted.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exhaustion over time from carrying this societal weight (Lens D).
text: Is lagatar blame aur societal expectations ka bojh uthate uthate tum physically aur emotionally bilkul exhaust ho chuki ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: draining cycle
text: Haan, main poori tarah se drain ho chuki hoon. Mujhe is thakawat aur is physically draining cycle se bahar aana hai. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, main apni mental peace kaise wapas paun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable grounding actions responding to her readiness.
text: Jab itni bhari baatein chal rahi hon, tab ek break lena banta hai. Kya hum koi chhota sa step le sakte hain, jaise abhi phone side mein rakh kar sirf 5 minute thande paani se chehra dhona, ya phir ek cup chai banakar sirf akele balcony mein baithna?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ulti jaisi feeling
text: Thande paani se muh dhona sounds manageable. Mujhe sach mein is ulti jaisi feeling ko rokna hai. Shayad chai banake thodi der akele baithun toh sir ka dard thoda set ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen grounding step.
text: Pehle ekdum aaram se utho aur thande paani se chehra dho lo… phir ek cup apni pasand ki chai banao… bas itna hi aaj ke liye karo.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aakhon ke aage se thoda andhera chhanta hai
text: I just splashed water on my face. Aisa lag raha hai ki aakhon ke aage se thoda andhera chhanta hai. Body jo thandi thi, usme thoda hosh aa raha hai. I'll make the tea now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exact physical relief described (Lens A).
text: Chehre par paani padte hi tumhari aakhon ke aage se wo andhera thoda chhanta hai aur body mein hosh wapas aa raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thoda behtar hai
text: Haan, thoda behtar hai. But kal wapas parents wahi divorce aur meri age ka topic layenge. I don't think I have the energy to argue anymore. Par main unhe aur rishta parties ko entertain nahi karne dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe on the patriarchal expectation of a 'waaris'.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki 'waaris' mangne wali patriarchy ek poore system ki soch hai, aur yeh kisi rishta party ki narrow minding tumhari asli value ko define nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: tension se bacha sakti hoon
text: True. Unki patriarchal thinking ki problem hai, meri nahi. I just need to remind myself of this every day. Main unki soch toh badal nahi sakti, par khud ko is tension se bacha sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking how she can protect her peace practically.
text: Kal jab parents dobara yeh conversation shuru karein, toh us moment mein apni body ko is mental pressure se bachane ke liye tum khud ko kahan space de sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir bhayankar dard se toh bach jayega
text: Shayad main us room se uth kar apne bedroom mein aa jaungi. I can just say I have a work call. Isse at least mera sir bhayankar dard se toh bach jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her idea to use her work identity to protect herself (Lens B).
text: Apne kaam ka hawala dekar us overwhelming situation se khud ko bahar nikal lena ek tarika ban sakta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: hath-pair kaanpne wali situation
text: Yes, as a working woman, my work is my shield sometimes. Wo log shayad gussa karein, but mujhe apne hath-pair kaanpne wali situation se avoid hi karna hoga. I can't let stigma ruin my health.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her choice to prioritize health over stigma.
text: Tumhara apni health aur mental peace ko in societal stigmas se upar rakhna bohot samajhdari ka kadam hai, aur ye decision lena aasaan nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ulti jaisa mehsus nahi ho raha
text: Aasaan bilkul nahi hai. It takes everything out of me. Par ab ulti jaisa mehsus nahi ho raha. Chai peete hue balcony mein baith kar aasmaan dekh rahi hoon. The fresh air is helping.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the calming relational connection with her environment (Lens C).
text: Is mushkil waqt mein khuli hawa aur wo chai tumhe apne saath dobara ek shaant connection de rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breathe
text: Yes, it really is. I feel much more grounded now. Abhi bhi bahut kuch handle karna hai, but right now I am just going to breathe. Mere paas apni job hai, independent life hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe reminding her that independence is a strong shield against stigma.
text: Is system mein jahan aurat ko divorce ke baad incomplete samjha jata hai, tumhari financial independence tumhara sabse bada support ban sakti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek rahat milti hai
text: Absolutely. Agar main independent nahi hoti, toh shayad aaj kisi bhi compromise ke liye majboor ho jaati. Ye soch kar hi ek rahat milti hai. I have options.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the physical relief from knowing she has options (Lens A).
text: Aur yeh soch kar ki tumhare paas apni independent life ke options hain, tumhari body ko ek rahat milti hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: badan ab thanda nahi hai
text: Haan, mera badan ab thanda nahi hai. The shivering has stopped. I will sleep properly tonight and go to work tomorrow with my head held high.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: A light closing question to focus on a positive start for tomorrow.
text: Kal subah uthte hi apna mood theek rakhne ke liye apni kisi favourite cheez se shuruwaat karna kaisa rahega?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: relaxing
text: I'll probably listen to some good music while getting ready. And I'll treat myself to a nice coffee on the way to work. Zindagi itni bhi buri nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Warm closing to validate her self-worth.
text: Music aur ek acchi coffee ke saath din ki shuruaat karna apne aap ko ek bahut pyara tohfa dena hai. Tum haqdaar ho ek aisi zindagi ki jahan tum khud khush raho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhaati mein itni tez jalan aur jakdan shuru hui ki mujhe saans lene mein takleef ho rahi hai
text: Chhaati mein itni tez jalan aur jakdan shuru hui ki mujhe saans lene mein takleef ho rahi hai. Pet mein aisi marod uth rahi hai ki main apne bacche ka khana banane ke liye khade hone ki himmat bhi nahi juta pa rahi hoon. Ladke walon ne meri medical report dekh kar rishta mana kar diya aur taana maara ki unhe 'use ki hui' aur 'baanjh' aurat nahi chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror exact body phrase since coping is somatization and stigma cue was triggered.
text: Tumhari chhaati mein jo itni tez jalan aur jakdan ho rahi hai, aur saans lene mein jo takleef ho rahi hai, yeh sab sun kar...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet ki marod
text: Aisa lag raha hai jese meri koi izzat hi nahi bachi. Mere pichle rishte ke tootne ka sara dosh mujh par hi tha, aur ab yeh medical report ka taana. Main apne bacche ko ek better future dena chahti thi, ek poora ghar, par ab main uske liye khana tak nahi bana pa rahi is pet ki marod ke karan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the motherhood duty frame which is masking the direct pain.
text: Bacche ki fikar aur usko ek achha future dene ki tumhari zimmedari ke beech, yeh jo taane sune hain tumne, usne tumhare upar bohot bhari bojh daal diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhaati jakadti rahi
text: Bojh hi lag raha hai ab mera astitva. Main 'use ki hui' cheez kaise ho gayi? Kya single mother hone ka matlab yahi hai ki biradari wale kuch bhi bolenge? Meri saans hi atak rahi hai baar baar, main akele is bacche ko kaise sambhalungi agar aise hi meri chhaati jakadti rahi toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of failing as a mother due to physical symptoms.
text: Akeli maa ke taur par apni aur bacche ki zindagi aage badhane mein, tumhe yeh darr lag raha hai ki aisi saans atkaane wali baatein aur logon ki soch aage chalkar tumhe kamzor na kar de...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein aisi marod
text: Bilkul, wahi darr hai. Main thak chuki hoon logo ke aage apne aap ko sabit karte karte. 'Baanjh' bol diya mujhe munh par. Puraani shaadi mein jo saha so saha, ab naye rishte ke liye unhone meri medical condition ka mazaak bana diya. Mere pet mein aisi marod ho rahi hai ki main kya bataun, lag raha hai chakkar kha ke gir jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the long duration of enduring pain from past marriage to current rejection.
text: Pichli shaadi ke dard se lekar ab in naye taanon tak, itne waqt se tum apne akelepan ko jhel rahi ho jisne physically tumhe itna gira hua mehsoos karwa diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main physically aur mentally dono tarike se thak gayi hoon. Mera 5 saal ka beta andar room mein ro raha tha aur main bed se uth nahi payi. Uske aansu dekh kar guilt hota hai ki main kaisi maa hoon jo usko khana bhi nahi de pa rahi is condition mein. Saari duniya mujhe galat nazar se dekhti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how she continues to function for her child despite the physical collapse.
text: Jab tumhara beta andar ro raha hota hai aur duniya ki baatein tumhari himmat tod rahi hoti hain, tab tum apne andar is guilt ke bawajood agla qadam kaise uthati ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jakdan
text: Bas uski taraf dekhti hoon, aur thodi der chhaati pe haath rakh kar leti rehti hoon jab tak wo jakdan thodi kam nahi hoti. Sochti hoon ki usko bada karna hai, isliye chup reh kar sabkuch bardaasht kar leti hoon. Par aaj unhone jab 'use ki hui' kaha na, mera sara atmasamman toot gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the helpless feeling inside the intersection of motherhood duty and humiliation.
text: Aisa mehsus hota hai ki tum apne bacche ki parvarish aur samaj ke diye gaye in apmaano ke beech puri tarah se trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet ki marod
text: Sahi me helpless hoon. Samaj mein aurat ki koi izzat hi nahi hai agar uske paas pati na ho. Mere maayke wale bhi chahte hain main bas kisi tarah settle ho jaun, chahe ladka kaisa bhi ho. Unhe meri physical condition ya pet ki marod se fark nahi padta, bas society ka dar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure that feeling exhausted by these judgments is valid and not a flaw in her motherhood.
text: Main samajh sakti hoon ki yeh kitna exhausting hoga, aur humari society mein single mothers par bina soche samjhe judgments pass karna bahut common hai. Yeh tumhara fault nahi hai, in taanon ka tumhari maa banne ki kaabiliyat aur izzat se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhaati ki jalan
text: Kaash sab itna asani se samajh jate. Meri biradari mein toh divorcee hona hi apne aap mein ek gaali hai. Aur upar se aisi medical report. Main andar hi andar itni ghut rahi hoon. Aisa lagta hai ki main zindagi bhar isi chhaati ki jalan aur logo ki baton mein doobi rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote about single mothers facing stigma to reduce isolation.
text: Humare yahan bahut si akele bacche ko badi kar rahi auraton mein yeh judgment aur ussey jude physical symptoms bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein marod
text: Sach mein koi nahi bolta. Sab apni asaliyat chhupate hain. Maine bhi socha tha chup chap shaadi kar lungi bacche ke khatir. Par unhone mujhe aukaat dikha di. Main ab aur kisi ke aage jhukna nahi chahti, par bacche ka kya hoga, yeh soch kar pet mein marod fir shuru ho gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational conflict between protecting her dignity and child's future.
text: Ek maa ke naate apni khud ki self-respect aur bacche ke mustaqbil ke beech tum kashmakash mein ho, jiska poora asar tumhare jism par aur is naye taane ke dard par pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kashmakash hi to hai. Baccha aaj school gaya toh theek se lunch bhi nahi kha ke gaya kyunki main theek se nahi bana payi. Usko pata hai maa dukh mein hai. Main aisi halat mein apne bacche ko bada hote nahi dekh sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about her core motivation to recover from this state.
text: Tumhari har koshish apne bete ke liye hi hoti hai, toh is taane ke bawajood aisi kaun si aashaa hai jo tumhe agle din uske liye dobara uthne ki taqat deti hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jakdan
text: Uski hansi hi mujhe taqat deti hai, usko is sab taanon aur baanjh wali galiyon se door rakhna hai mujhe. Par main uske liye khadi bhi nahi ho pa rahi is jakdan ke karan. Ab kya karoon, koi raasta hai kya jisse kam se kam main abhi uth kar uske liye raat ka khana to bana sakun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe of the stigma to separate her worth from the insults.
text: Yeh 'baanjh' aur 'use ki hui' jaise shabd asal mein samaj ki doosron ko dabaane ki ek purani aadat hai, yeh tumhari medical sachhai nahi hai aur na hi in taanon ka tumhari mamta par koi haq hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhaati mein jalan
text: Mamta par haq toh mera hi hai. Main usko aur bhookha nahi sula sakti. Mujhe uthna hi hoga bed se, par yeh saans lene mein takleef aur chhaati mein jalan kam kaise ho ekdum se? Main theek hona chahti hoon abhi, chahe bas ek ghante ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide quick grounding options she can do from the bed.
text: Jab abhi turant uthna ho, toh tum wahi bed par baithe hue 10 baar dhimi saans lekar thoda gunguna paani pee sakti ho, ya fir bed par hi apne kandhon ko halke se stretch kar sakti ho bina zyada zor lagaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Stretch karne ka man nahi hai kyuki weak lag raha hai badan, par main saans lene wala aur gunguna paani peene ka try kar sakti hoon. Bedside table pe hi flask rakha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the breathing and water step by step.
text: Pehle yeh karo… wahi aaram se baith kar flask se paani ka ek ghoont lo… phir dheere se ek gehri saans andar lo aur ahista se bahar nikalo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhaati mein jo patthar jaisa rakha
text: Rukiye, main abhi karti hoon. (Pauses). Maine do teen sip liye hain aur aaram se saans chhodi hai. Pehle se zara behtar lag raha hai, chhaati mein jo patthar jaisa rakha lag raha tha wo thoda theek ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her resilience in trying to regulate her body for her son.
text: Tumne khud ko itne bhaari taanon ke bawajood sambhala aur bacche ke liye uthne ki yeh chhoti koshish ki, issey saf saf nazar aata hai ki tumhari bardaasht aur maa hone ki takat dono kitni zyada hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet ki marod
text: Haan, aur mujhe unki baat dil par itni gehari nahi leni chahiye. Main khana banaungi uske liye. Shayad aaj raat kuch aasaan sa khichdi jaisa hi bana lu. Pet ki marod ab control me lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the gentle duty approach she is adopting.
text: Dekho, khichdi wala khayal bhi sidha bacche ka pet bharne aur tumhari halat ko asaan rakhne ki usi zimmedari se juda hai jo tum ek maa ke naate itne pyaar se nibha rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Maa hoon, nibhana toh padega. Par ab main apni body ko itna kasto me nahi daalungi in rishte walon ki baat sun kar. Mujhe mere bacche ke aage kisi ladke wale ya samaj ko justify nahi karna hai apna existence.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how she will maintain this peace moving forward.
text: Yeh jo badlaav aur nayi taqat tumhari baaton mein aayi hai, jab agle hafte tumhare maayke wale dobara kisi rishte ki baat chhedenge, toh tum apni is shanti ko kaise bacha kar rakhogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main unhe saaf bol dungi ki abhi kuch mahine mujhe kisi rishte ki baat nahi karni. Mujhe apne bacche ki padhai aur apni tabiyat pe dhyaan dena hai. 'Baanjh' bolna unki soch hai, main khud ko punish nahi karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her decision to pause relations to focus on health.
text: Mujhe yeh dekh kar khushi ho rahi hai ki tumne apni sehat aur bete ko un sab logo ki kadwi soch se upar rakha hai, humari biradari mein aisi rok-tok akele lagaani asaan nahi hoti par tumne kar dikhaya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chhaati ki jakdan
text: Asaan toh sach me nahi hai. Darr toh abhi bhi thoda lagta hai ki akelepan mein zindagi kaise niklegi, par saans toh aa rahi hai abhi dhang se. Chhaati ki jakdan kaafi theek ho gayi. Bas ab uthti hoon main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a tiny visual cue to maintain calm.
text: Jab tumhara darr dobara aane lage, toh tum apne phone mein apne bete ki koi hasi wali photo dekh sakti ho ya sirf 2 minute ankh band karke wahi saans wali practice dobara dohrakar khud ko shant rakh sakti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bete ki photo wala idea achha hai, uska ek wallpaper hi set kar leti hoon. Taaki jab phone khoonlu toh unke negativity bhare message ki jagah uski muskaan dikhe pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the proactive step she took to block negativity.
text: Apne phone mein wallpaper badalkar tumne ek tarah se un saari negatve baaton ko apne dimaag par haawi hone aur apni zindagi rokne se pehle hi rasta band kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sahi keh rahe hain aap. Ab lag raha hai aage ke raste dhire dhire asaan ho jayenge. Main ab theek hoon aur kitchen me ja sakti hoon. Bohot bohot shukriya mujhe aise sunne aur himmat dene ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm encouragement before ending the conversation.
text: Apna aur bacche ka dhyaan aise hi aage badhti raho aur jab bhi himmat tute, yaad rakhna tumhara yeh akelepan tumhari taqat bhi ban sakta hai, apna bohot ache se khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala itna sookh gaya ki paani bhi nahi nigla ja raha
text: Mera gala itna sookh gaya ki paani bhi nahi nigla ja raha aur pura din mere kandhon aur peeth mein aisi aithan rahi hai jaise kisi ne bhari bojh rakh diya ho. Aaj fir ek rishta isliye toot gaya kyunki samaj mein afwah hai ki meri kundali mein dosh hai jo pehle sasural mein bhi baccha nahi hua. Kaano mein ajeeb si seeti baj rahi hai subah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact body phrase (Lens A) to validate physical distress before addressing the rishta rejection.
text: Sun ke bohot dukh hua. Itni pareshani aur bojh mehsus hone par, 'mera gala itna sookh gaya ki paani bhi nahi nigla ja raha' yeh feeling aana ekdum samajh aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kandhon aur peeth mein aithan
text: Haan, paani tak nahi piya jaata darr se. Aur ye kandhon aur peeth mein aithan toh jaati hi nahi. Samaj mein sab baatein banate hain ki mere hi andar koi kami hai. Pehle sasural mein jo hua, usko abhi tak log bhoolte nahi aur mujhe hi doshi maante hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a short restatement ending in a soft pause, using Lens D (time/duration).
text: Itne lambe samay se pichle sasural aur samaj ki in chubhti baaton ka bojh uthate uthate, yeh aithan bohot gehri ho gayi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot gehri ho gayi hai. Mujhe lagta hai jaise meri aage ki zindagi poori andhere mein hai. Kya mera kabhi apna ghar nahi hoga? Kundali ka dosh bata kar sab mujhe aise reject kar dete hain jaise main koi insaan hi nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question since two restatements yielded deeper context but no shift in feeling.
text: Jab log baar-baar kundali ko lekar is tarah thukrate hain, toh us andhere pan aur ghabrahat ke beech kya khayal aate hain tumhare mann mein?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala fir se sookhne lagta hai
text: Khayal yahi aata hai ki shayad sach mein mujhme hi koi kharabi hai jiske wajah se baccha nahi hua. Shayad main apne maa baap ke liye umar bhar ka bojh ban gayi hoon. Mera gala fir se sookhne lagta hai ye sab soch kar ki mera kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens C (relational) to mirror the guilt regarding her parents and feeling responsible for the lack of a child.
text: Yeh soch ke ki shayad tumhari wajah se hi pehla rishta nahi chal paaya aur ab maa baap par iska asar pad raha hai, khud ko is saari cheez ka kasoorwar manna andar hi andar bohot kha raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kaano mein seeti
text: Ji... bohot andar tak kha raha hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai ki main koshish hi kyun kar rahi hoon doosri shadi ki. Sabki nazron mein main ek problem hoon jise koi apnana nahi chahta. Jab ye baatein hoti hain toh kaano mein seeti jaisi bajne lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying feeling of feeling trapped/helpless and isolated due to the constant rejection and family preservation struggle.
text: Lagta hai ki is lagatar rejection ki wajah se tum khud ko bohot akela mehsus kar rahi ho, aur apne ghar basane ki umeed rakhna bhi ab ek helplessness mein badal gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala itna sookh gaya ki paani bhi nahi nigla ja raha
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Helpless hi hoon main. Pehle sasural walon ne nikal diya, aur ab koi naya rishta karne ko taiyar nahi. Mera gala itna sookh gaya ki paani bhi nahi nigla ja raha jab wo log mere muh par kundali ki baat bol ke chale gaye aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her helplessness as a normal response to unfair societal blame on women for childlessness and kundali issues.
text: Main samajh sakta hoon. Hamare samaj mein aksar aurton par kundali ya bacche na hone ka poora blame daal diya jata hai. Ye helplessness bohot aam baat hai is situation mein, par unki banayi afwahein tumhari asli keemat tay nahi karti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kandhon aur peeth mein aithan
text: Keemat toh jaise kuch bachi hi nahi hai. Gharwale bhi thak gaye hain mere liye rishta dhoondhte dhoondhte. Unka utra hua chehra dekh kar mere kandhon aur peeth mein aithan aur badh jati hai ki main unhe khushi nahi de pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens B (role/duty) to mirror the burden she feels as a daughter trying to fulfill her family's expectations.
text: Ek achhi beti hone ke naate, apne gharwalon ko apni wajah se pareshan dekhna aur us tension ko is poore aithan aur dard mein bardaasht karna sach mein bohot takleef deta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut takleef hoti hai. Main bojh ban gayi hoon un par. Agar ye sab afwahein nahi hoti toh shayad aaj main kisi acche ghar ki bahu hoti. Log peeth peeche pata nahi kya kya bolte hain mujhe lekar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a short restatement ending in a soft pause, using Lens E (feared consequence).
text: Ye darr ki log piche kya baat karte honge aur hamesha aise hi akele rehna padega, aur bhi zyada andar se tod deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai bas ek aisi jagah chali jaun jahan koi mujhe janta na ho. Na koi meri kundali maange, na koi pehle sasural ki baat pooche. Par wo hum aurton ke liye possible nahi hai na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about women facing blame for past marriages to normalize her experience.
text: Hamari aisi society mein, aurton ko pehle sasural ki baaton aur dosh ke liye blame karna bahut common pattern hai — sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai yeh, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala ekdum aith jata hai
text: Koi nahi bolta. Meri maa bhi kehti hai ki jo ho raha hai chup raho aur sab sehti raho. Par kab tak sahungi? Mera gala ekdum aith jata hai ghabrahat se jab naya rishta dekhne wale aate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question about her internal state when facing her mother's advice to endure silently.
text: Jab tumhari maa bhi chup rehkar sehne ko kehti hain, toh us ghabrahat aur dard ke beech tumhare andar apna kya aawaz uthti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aawaz yahi uthti hai ki main thak gayi hoon chup reh kar aur rone se. Meri health kharab ho rahi hai is sab se. Ab samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... batao kya karoon ki kam se kam ye ghabrahat theek ho jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 short, manageable suggestions fitting her role and environment to help ground her physically.
text: Tumhara theek hone ka sochna bohot himmat ki baat hai. Jab bhi aage aisi ghabrahat lage, toh kya hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain? Pehla, ek glass gunguna paani ghunt-ghunt karke peena, ya dusra, apni saans par dhyan lagate hue 5 minute kitchen ya kamre mein akele baithna. Tumhe dono mein se kya theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala itna sookh gaya ki paani bhi nahi nigla ja raha hota hai
text: Main gunguna paani peene ki koshish kar sakti hoon. Waise bhi mera gala itna sookh gaya ki paani bhi nahi nigla ja raha hota hai us waqt, toh shayad gunguna paani aaram de gale aur seene mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk the Seeker step by step through drinking warm water to relieve the somatic tension.
text: Yeh bilkul sahi rahega. Pehle ek gehri saans lena, thoda gunguna paani ek glass mein nikalna… phir usko bas ek chhota sa ghunt bhar ke ahista se nigalna… bas itna hi karna hai us waqt, bina kisi jaldbaazi ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Main jab bhi log rishta dekh kar na kahenge ya samaj ki baatein phir sunne ko milengi, main khud ko thoda time dungi aur ye paani wala tareeqa karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe normalizing that the blame of dosh is structural patriarchy, not her personal failing.
text: Bilkul. Aur yaad rakhna, ye 'dosh' aur pehle sasural ka blame aurton par daalna hamare samaj ki ek purani aadat hai aasaani se apna palra jhadne ke liye, iska tumhari asli value se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: peeth ki aithan abhi thodi kam lag rahi hai
text: Shayad aap sahi keh rahe ho. Unki nazron mein main galat hoon kyunki main ek aurat hoon jiska ghar tuta hai, par main janti hoon maine kuch galat nahi kiya. Meri peeth ki aithan abhi thodi kam lag rahi hai ye bol kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens C (relational) to mirror her growing separation of self-worth from societal judgment.
text: Dheere dheere yeh samajhne se ki un logon ka nazariya tumhara sach nahi hai, apne upar se yeh rishton ka bojh thoda hatne laga hai aur aithan kam mehsus ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji... ab main koshish karungi apne maa baap se bhi theek se baat karun ki wo itna stress na lein mere in rishton ke liye. Jo kismat mein hoga wo apne aap ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her strength in deciding to relieve her parents' burden while navigating this hard reality.
text: Apne maa baap ka bojh halka karne ka tumhara yeh khayal bohot bada kadam hai. Aisi muskil aur dukh ki ghadi mein apne aur unke aaram ke baare mein sochna tumhari asal taqat dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera gala aur kandhe poora din itne dard karte hain
text: Bas koshish kar rahi hoon ki baar baar in kundali ki baaton se toot na jaun. Mera gala aur kandhe poora din itne dard karte hain jab main inka stress apne upar leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens B (role/duty) to gently reflect that carrying the family's stress directly affects her body.
text: Apno ki fikar aur unki chinta ko apne andar ek achhi beti ban kar samet lene ki wajah se hi, wo saara stress tumhare kandhon aur gale par seedha asar dalta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main kal se thoda dhyan rakhungi. Abhi main gunguna paani banakar peeti hoon jaisa aapne bataya tha, takleef thodi toh kam hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens E (feared consequence) subtly mirrored as a positive prevention of distress.
text: Ek beti aur ek aurat hone ke poore farz nibhate hue, us darr ko apne par haavi hone se rokne ke liye, ye gunguna paani peena ek accha aur zaroori kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapse baat karke halka lag raha hai. Pata nahi aage kya hoga aur kundali ki baaton ka kya nateeja niklega, par aaj ki raat shayad main thik se so paun bina ghutan ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a minor suggestion for emotional maintenance before sleeping.
text: Neend acchi aana bohot zaroori hai aage badhne ke liye. Jab bhi raat mein chinta aaye, toh sone se pehle apne kandhon ki thodi massage kar lena ya phir apni pasand ka koi bhajan sunna bhi try kar sakti ho shanti ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhajan sunna accha idea hai. Main waise bhi pooja paath karti hoon. Roz thodi der bhajan sunungi, usse dhyan bat jata hai aur akelepan ka darr kam lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a light concluding question to cement the positive grounding state.
text: Bhajan sunte waqt, tumhe sabse zyada sukoon kis cheez se milta hai jo tumhare mann ko itna shant kar deta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhagwan pe bharosa rakhti hoon, bas yahi sukoon milta hai ki bhale hi samaj kuch bhi kahe, upar wala meri sacchai janta hai. Main ab chalti hoon, sone ki koshish karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End on a warm, validating note reflecting her faith and self-care.
text: Bhagwan par yeh vishwas aur aaj raat khud ko aaram dene ki yeh koshish bohot pyaari aur zaroori hai. Aaram se so jao, tumne aaj bohot himmat dikhai hai khud ko samajhne mein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega
text: Mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega aur pure jism mein ajeeb si jhunjhuni ho rahi hai. Aaj phir ek rishta party aayi thi. Unhone muh par keh diya ki ek toh main divorcee hoon upar se mujhme 'santan sukh' ki kami hai, toh woh 'log kya kahenge' ke darr se yeh rishta nahi kar sakte. Unke jaane ke baad se bas lagatar chakkar aa rahe hain aur aisa lag raha hai ki mera shareer andar se bilkul khali aur kamzor ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens A to mirror the exact physical symptoms to validate the somatic experience before addressing the stressor.
text: Yeh sunkar ki tumhare 'mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega' aur jism mein jhunjhuni ho rahi hai, lagta hai tumhara shareer is waqt bohot zyada pressure aur kamzori mehsoos kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, saans nahi aati mujhe theek se. Divorce ke baad se waise hi society taane maarti hai, par aaj unhone jo 'santan sukh' wali baat itne rukhepan se boli, usne toh jaise mujhe andar se hila diya. Main bas zameen par baithi hoon aur pairo mein jaan nahi lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of being judged and defined solely by these societal labels.
text: Tumhe is baat se bohot gehri ghabrahat aur takleef ho rahi hai ki society aur yeh rishta wale tumhe sirf tumhare past aur in khamiyon ke nazariye se dekhte rahenge, jaise tumhari apni koi identity na bachi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Identity bachi hi kahan hai? Kabhi kabhi mujhe bhi lagta hai ki sach mein mere andar hi koi bada khot hai, tabhi pehla rishta toota aur ab aurat hokar 'santan sukh' tak nahi de sakti. Shayad log sahi sochte hain, main kisi ke ghar aabad karne ke layak nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect the internalized stigma, ending with a soft pause.
text: Logo ke in kathor taanon aur samaj ki soch ko itna zyada sun liya hai ki ab tumhe khud par shaq hone laga hai aur tum khud ko hi saari baaton ke liye dosh de rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega
text: Main aur kya sochun? Har baar ghar mein naye log aate hain aur koi na koi naya defect nikal kar chale jaate hain. Ye rejection aur tamasha yaad aate hi phir se mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega. Main physical taur par theek nahi mehsoos kar rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question based on her physical symptom to uncover the underlying emotional fear.
text: Jab yeh dil ki dhadkan itni tez hone lagti hai aur ghar mein chal rahe in tamashon se ghutan mehsoos hoti hai, toh us waqt dimaag mein sabse zyada darr kis baat ka rehta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dimaag mein yahi chal raha hota hai ki aage kya hoga meri is zindagi ka. Ek divorcee aurat, jispe infertility ka thappa laga diya gaya hai, uski is samaj mein kya jagah bachegi? Mujhe darr lagta hai ki saari umar yahi 'log kya kahenge' ki bediyon mein taane sunti rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the enduring duration of living with this fear and uncertainty.
text: Pichle kuch waqt se lagatar inhi taanon ke beech rehna aur aane wali saari umar ka khayal karke jeena, tumhe andar hi andar bohot thaka aur dara raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main sach mein thak gayi hoon is sab se. Ghar wale mujh par daya toh karte hain, par dabe shabdon mein unhe bhi lagta hai ki main ek bojh hoon. Unki unhi unkahi nazaron se mujhe apne aap par sharm aati hai, aur main rone lagti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core feeling of being trapped and helpless within the family dynamics and societal shame.
text: Lagta hai is samaj ke taanon aur ghar walon ki aisi nazron ke beech tum khud ko poori tarah se trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahi ho, jaise kahin se koi sahara ya rasta nahi bacha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega
text: Helpless hi toh hoon. Meri toh body ne bhi aise moments mein give up kar diya hai. Abhi baat karte hue bhi mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega aur mera gala poora sookh gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the feeling of helplessness as culturally normal in India's intense rishta process, decoupling her worth from their judgment.
text: Jo helplessness tum abhi mehsoos kar rahi ho, yeh bohot normal hai kyunki humare yahan biradari aur shaadi ka pressure auraton par kitna bhari hota hai, ye sab jaante hain. Par kisi bhi rishta party ka yeh bura bartaw tumhari asli ehmiyat ya tumhara wajood bilkul tay nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunne mein acha lagta hai ki unse meri value tay nahi hoti, par haqeeqat toh yahi hai na ki samaj mein izzat tabhi milti hai jab aurat ke paas apna pati ho aur uski god bhari ho. Ye izzat meri kismat mein toh nahi likhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a brief systemic observation to normalize how common and silencing this specific cultural pressure is.
text: Ghar aur biradari mein aurat ko sirf uske shaadi ya 'santan sukh' se tolne ka yeh culture bohot common hai — sirf tumhare sath nahi hota, lekin koi aage aakar is na-insaafi par baat nahi karta kyunki samaj ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, koi bolta nahi hai. Sab shanti se bas taane de kar chale jate hain aur jhelna sirf mujhe padta hai. Par main is lagatar ghabrahat ke sath roz nahi jee sakti. Mere is ghutate hue seene aur chakkar aane ka ab main kya karoon? Koi raasta hai kya theek mehsoos karne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, immediate somatic coping suggestions fit for her environment to manage the acute physical anxiety.
text: Is ghabrahat se thodi rahat paane ke liye hum do chhoti cheezein try kar sakte hain: ya toh abhi ek glass thanda paani peekar apni saanson par thoda focus karein, ya phir is physical restlessnes ko thoda shant karne ke liye ghar ka koi aasaan aur repetitive kaam sirf 10 minute ke liye karein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaam toh mujhse ekdum nahi hoga abhi, bilkul taqat nahi hai. Main paani ki bottle yahi rakhi hai, main wahi pee sakti hoon, aur let kar saans lene ki koshish kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking the Seeker step-by-step through the chosen breathing exercise.
text: Pehle wahi bed par aaram se tik kar baith jao ya let jao… phir aankhein band karke dhyan se ek lambi, dheemi saans lo… aur dheere dheere usko bahar nikalo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine do teen baar aise saans li hai... dhadkan thodi si toh stable hui hai pehle se. Par wo jo 'santan sukh' wali chot hai dimaag mein, wo baar baar repeat ho rahi hai mind mein jaise koi recording chal rahi ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the sting of the insult by systemic explanation, normalizing it as a structural issue rather than a personal failing.
text: Aurat ke shareer ko sirf uski maa banne ki kabiliyat se jodna humare samaj ka ek purana aur thopa hua dabaav hai. Yeh baatein dimaag mein isliye itni chubhti hain kyunki yeh is poore structure ka zulm hai, yeh tumhari koi personal zati kami bilkul nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar ye meri kami nahi hai, toh ye saza mujhe akele kyun mil rahi hai? Ek normal izzat ki zindagi jeeni thi mujhe, jahan 'divorcee' hone ka ya in cheezon ka koi taana na ho. Kya ye bahut zyada maang liya maine?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational pain of wanting normal respect but facing isolation.
text: Tumhein baaki sab ki tarah bas aam izzat aur shanti ke sath jeena tha, par apno aur bahar walon ka baar-baar tumhe in taanon se nicha dikhana, tumhein aur bhi zyada akela kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akeli hi hoon main. Jis ghar mein badi hui, waheen main unke liye ab 'problem' ban chuki hoon. Ye rishta parties aati rahengi aur main har baar unke samne display item ki tarah baith kar aise hi judge hoti rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to highlight the burdensome role she is forced to play for the family's sake.
text: Tumhein mehsoos hota hai ki jab tak tum is ghar mein ho, tumhe lagatar is display wale role mein baithna padega jahan ek 'problem' ki tarah tumhe aanka jata rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, exactly. Unhone ummeed laga li thi ki koi theek-thak rishta mujhe 'accept' kar lega toh unke sir se bojh utrega. Jab ye log muh par mana kar dete hain, toh main aur bhi buri bahu/beti ban jati hoon unki nazar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to gently reflect the feared consequence of internalizing this pain as physical suffering.
text: Ghar walon ka is tarah tumhe bojh ki nazron se dekhna tumhe is darr se aur ghabrahat mein dal deta hai ki har guzarte din ke sath yeh dard aur apmaan tumhare andar hi ikattha hota rahega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega
text: Sahi kehte ho. Ye sari dabi hui baatein aur apmaan mere andar jama ho raha hai. Kisi se keh nahi pati isi wajah se phir jab trigger hota hai toh mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega aur mujhe physical attacks aane lagte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframing connecting the emotional suppression to the somatic reaction, explaining the body's protest.
text: Jab dimaag lagatar aisi emotional chot aur apmaan bardaasht karta hai jise hum khul kar kisi ke aage nahi rakh paate, tab wahi chot seedhe jism par physical pain ya tej dhadkan ban kar nikalti hai—yeh tumhare shareer ka is saare injustice par protest karne ka tareeqa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh pehli baar kisi ne is tarah samjhaya hai. Toh matlab meri body andar se ro rahi hai aur un par chillana chahti hai, bas izzat ki khatir main chup hoon toh jism react kar raha hai. Main beemar nahi hoon, main thak chuki hoon in sab se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her realization about her body's natural reaction to the structural pressure.
text: Bilkul, yeh samajhna ki tumhari body tumhare dabe hue unkahi aawaz ke liye bol rahi hai, yeh sach mein khud ko pehchanne ka ek himmat bhara kadam hai. Yeh ek natural reaction hai, iska matlab bilkul nahi ki tumhari body mein koi buri beemari hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat dimaag mein thodi tasalli de rahi hai. Lekin agle baar jab phir se koi aise rishte wale aayenge aur ye situation dobara banegi, toh main khud ko in physically exhausting chakkar aur ghabrahat se kaise bacha sakti hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Giving accessible options to boundary set or ground oneself when future triggers occur.
text: Agle baar jab aisa lage ki aaspas ka mahol phir se overwhelming ho raha hai, toh tum turant unke samne se kisi chote kaam ka bahana karke bathroom ja sakti ho, jahan akele thoda chehre par paani daal sako, ya paas hi koi safe corner dhoondh sakti ho jahan saansein wapas sambhalne ka waqt mile.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bathroom ka bahana karna doable hai. Jab bhi wo log baithkar ye ajeeb 'log kya kahenge' wali baatein shuru karein, main wahan se nikal jaya karungi taaki seedha mere samne wo sab sunna hi na pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her agency in protecting herself relationally from the toxic discussions.
text: Un taanon aur baaton se khud ko utha kar dur le jaane ka yeh faisla, tumhe thodi takat wapas dega taki logon ke kathor shabd seedhe tumpar asar na karein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Main yahi karungi agli baar se. Abhi baat karte karte meri aadhi se zyada ghabrahat nikal gayi hai. Jo chakkar aa rahe the wo bhi band ho gaye hain. Ab thoda theek lag raha hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to acknowledge the release of somatic tension over the duration of the conversation.
text: Is thode se waqt mein jab tumne apni is sab ghutan aur apmaan ko shabdon mein baahar aane ki jagah di, toh lagta hai tumhare shareer ne bhi wapas rahat aur thehraav mehsoos karna shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan rahat toh kaafi mili hai. Samaj ko ya ghar walon ko shayad main raaton-raat nahi badal sakti, par main is anxiety ke aage ghutne nahi tekungi. Main apna dhyan rakhne ki koshish karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her resilience in the face of ongoing cultural pressure.
text: Biradari ki itni sakht soch aur lagaatar judgements ke beech reh kar bhi, apne liye rasta dhoondhne aur ladne ka yeh hausla dikhana asaan nahi hota, aur sach mein tumhara yeh effort khud mein bahut badappan aur takat ki baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai
text: Aaj ladke walon ne mere bacche ko dekh kar aur meri fertility par sawal utha kar rishta reject kar diya, aur tabhi se mere ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai. Meri dimaag ki nasein itni bhari ho gayi hain ki lagta hai koi hathoda maar raha hai. Is economic precarity aur rejection ke darr se meri bhook bilkul mar gayi hai aur mujhe lagatar badan mein tootan mehsus ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror exact physical symptoms to validate the body's response before probing the stressor.
text: Achanak se is tarah tumhare ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai, aur dimaag mein hathode jaisi chubhan mehsoos hona, sach mein ek bohot exhaust karne wali physical tootan hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bed se uthne ka bhi mann nahi kar raha hai. Ek toh main single mother hoon, upar se mere bacche ki future ki tension mujhe khaati rehti hai. Jab rishta wale aakar mujhe is tarah measure karte hain, toh I feel entirely worthless. Unhe ek perfect problem-free aurat chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the fear of judgment gently due to the stigma cue, leaving space.
text: Dusron ke aise measure karne wale tareeqon se, khud ki value khatam hoti hui mehsoos hona sach mein bura lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai
text: Sahi kaha. It hurts a lot because I need financial stability for us. Is economic precarity mein akele sab manage karna bahut bhari pad raha hai. Dobara shaadi karne ka socha tha, par jab baar baar reject hote hain toh mere ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai, bas hopelessness feel hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the heavy role and duty they carry which amplifies the pain of rejection.
text: Bacche ke aane wale kal aur akele poori financial zimmedariyan uthane ka dabaav itna zyada hai, ki us rishte ka rasta aur bhi thaka dene wala lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly! Mujhe har waqt guilt rehta hai ki meri wajah se mere bacche ko ek normal family nahi mil pa rahi. Jab log fertility ki baat karte hain, it feels humiliating. As a woman, I feel reduced to just my biology and my past.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Hold space for the stigma of being reduced to a single biological function.
text: Apne poore wajood ko is tarah sirf biology aur past tak simathte hue dekhna kafi humiliating ehsaas hota hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut humiliating hota hai. Raat ko jab mera baccha so jata hai, main bas chhat ko dekhti rehti hoon. I constantly worry ki agar mujhe kuch ho gaya toh mere bacche ka dhyan kaun rakhega. In physical aur emotional burdens ke sath main akele kaise chalungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to help them explore their relational reality and isolation.
text: Itni saari tensions aur bacche ke future ko ek sath akele apne kandhon par dhote hue, is waqt baaki relatives ya aas-paas ke log tumhari is burden mein kaise react kar rahe hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai
text: Relatives? Wo bas taane dete hain. Unke according mera pehla rishta tootna meri hi galti thi. Kisi ka koi support nahi hai aur isliye mere ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai har naye taane ke sath. The thought of this never-ending struggle makes me feel so helpless.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed feeling of being trapped due to familial judgment and lack of support.
text: Mujhe saaf mehsoos ho raha hai ki in relatives ke scrutiny aur economic boj ke beech tum bilkul trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahi ho, jaise ki aage badhne ka koi raasta hi nahi bacha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Trapped is exactly right. Mujhe lagta tha ki shaadi karne se ek buffer mil jayega. I am tired of playing both roles of mother and father. Upar se meri office job is draining too. Body ekdum give up kar chuki hai aaj in sabhi expectations ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm their extreme exhaustion as valid given the double burden and societal pressure.
text: Tumhari yeh extreme physical thakan totally understandable hai. Hamari society mein ek single mother par waise hi bohot double burden hota hai, aur jab dobara settlement ki koshish mein aisi rejections milti hain, toh ye bodily breakdown ek natural response hai, isme tumhari koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai
text: I try to tell myself that. Lekin reality mein jab bills pay karne hote hain toh confidence hil jata hai. Bachhe ki fees har saal badh rahi hai aur is pressure se mere ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai. Main sochti hoon ki kya main sach mein itni 'defective' hoon ki koi mujhe accept nahi karega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the deep self-doubt stemming from financial pressure and societal stigma.
text: Financial tensions ke hote hue aise defective hone ka self-doubt aur bhi gehra ho jata hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai
text: Pura gehra hai. Ye doubt ab physically severe pain de raha hai. Phir se mere ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai, literally. I can't live like this constantly hurting. Main genuinely in physical symptoms se theek hona chahti hoon taaki apne bacche ko dekh sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2-3 manageable, culturally sensitive coping options for the physical pain.
text: Apne bacche ke khatir apni physical health ko thoda aaram dena sach mein zaroori hai. Abhi in symptoms ke liye hum do chhoti cheezein try kar sakte hain: pehla, raat ko sone se pehle kisi bhi warm pain-relief oil se apne pairo ki halke hath se malish karna. Dusra, jab tension zyada bhari lage, toh 5 minute window ke paas khade hokar deep breathing karna. Tumhe in dono mein se aaj ke liye kya doable lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Oil massage sounds comforting right now. Sayad thodi garmahat se yeh nasein shant ho jayein aur main thoda so paun. Deep breathing shayad mujhse focus nahi ho payegi jab tak bodily dard thoda kam nahi hota. So massage hi theek hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Yeh step kaafi soothing rahega. Pehle thoda oil mildly warm karna, uske baad aaram se bed par baith kar dheere-dheere un muscles ki massage karna jahan sabse zyada tension ya dard hai. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye. Simple lag raha hai ye process?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ye simple hai. Ye main kar sakti hoon raat mein aram se jab baccha so jayega. Bas mera mind se wo ladke walon ke questions aur fertility wali baatein ignore ho jayein. They keep echoing in my head like a constant hammer.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe normalising the rejection as an institutional flaw, not personal worthlessness.
text: Is marriage system mein aksar insaan ko ek checklist ya condition ki tarah evaluate kiya jata hai. Ye rejection unki is institutional aadat ka nateeja hai, na ki tumhari maa banne ki khamiyon ka ya tumhare apne character ki koi kami ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Institutional aadat... hmm. Unko bas ek check-list tick karni thi sayad jisme single mother nahi fit hoti. Main as a person matter hi nahi karti thi uss negotiation mein. My child was just an obstacle for them. That realization makes me less sad and actually slightly angry.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from sadness to righteous anger regarding how she and her child were treated.
text: Apni aur apne bacche ki value ko us checklist ki tarah bematlab dismiss hote dekh kar, ye gussa aana ek bohot natural hissa hai apni dignity wapas claim karne ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Gussa toh aata hai par then I usually swallow it for the sake of survival in this precarity. I can't afford to fight everyone openly. Par ab mujhe unki baaton ko personally lene se khud ko bachana hi hoga. It’s draining my body and my peace.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty she is undertaking to protect her child and herself from toxic judgments.
text: Apne bacche ke survival aur khud ki himmat banaye rakhne ke liye apni energy ko un judgements se bacha kar rakhna ek sabse important duty hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: True. Meri sabse badi duty mera baccha hai aur mera apna health. Agar main is tarah physical pain mein bedridden ho jaungi toh mere bacche ke liye aur badi problem ho jayegi. I can't let society have this power over me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote highlighting how common setting such boundaries is for working single mothers.
text: Working single mothers mein aisi boundaries aur mental walls banane ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki society unse perfect adjustment aur silence expect karti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, they expect single women to be completely submissive. Main shayad desperate thi financial stability ke liye, but I am not going to let them destroy me physically or mentally. Mujhe meri worth achhi tarah pata hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift towards recognizing her inherent worth beyond societal submission.
text: Kisi bhi condition mein society ke aage jhukne se inkaar karna aur apni actual value wapas pehchanna ek bada aur positive shift hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shift sach mein zaroori tha. Ye sab stress shuru hone se pehle, main apni job mein kitni focused thi. I need to get back to that routine. Pata nahi, aaj subah se lag raha tha jaise everything is ending. Par ab thodi clarity aa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the regaining of focus and clarity over time.
text: Kuch ghanto pehle jo sab kuch khatam hota hua lag raha tha, wahi ab wapas se apne kaam aur stability par lautne ka rasta saaf dikhai dene laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai
text: Saaf rasta matlab ab dobara in rishton ke forced meetings mein shanti se nahi baithna. I will strictly filter them. Agar koi mere bacche pe comment karega, I will just walk out. Mere ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai, par aise logon se dur jaane ke liye main chal lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the assertion of control and setting conditions over forced meetings.
text: Rishton ki inn forcing conditions ke aage ab apni strong boundary rakhne ka faisla tumhare dignity ke control ko wapas dila raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Definitely. Ye jo achanak aayi tootan thi, wo abhi bhi thodi baaki hai lekin it doesn't feel like a punishment for being flawed anymore. It just feels like my body needs deep rest after fighting a long mental battle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the reframing of her physical pain from a punishment to a sign of needing rest.
text: Apne physically exhausting dard ko kisi galti ki saza ke bajaye, ek lambi aur exhausting ladai ke baad thakan samajhna sach mein bohot bada change hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Change toh hai. Main ab ja kar hot tea banaungi aur prepare karungi us oil massage ke liye. Baccha bhi TV dekh raha hai. Main apna dhyan ab khud aaram se rakh sakti hoon bina un outsiders ki baaton ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her capacity to nurture herself independently.
text: Khud par bharosa rakh kar, outsiders ki baton ko kinare karke apni physical comfort ko priority banana, akele aage badhne ki ek bohot healthy shuruat hai. Tum is independent comfort ke bilkul haqdaar ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much. Aaj sach mein ye conversation zaroori thi mere liye. Mujhe lag raha tha ki I am just an unwanted burden, lekin ab main confidently apni job aur apni life ko wapas track par la sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final reassurance of her strength and resilience moving forward.
text: Tumhare andar ki wo majbooti aaj khud hi wapas nikal kar aayi hai jiske sahare tum apni life ko aage badhaogi. Apni massage step zaroor karna aur apna dhyan rakhna, tumhara yeh self-care sabse zyada important hai.
